title: RainbowWrenchForJei:RF
description: Changes the JEI cheat mode icon to a rotating rainbow wrench.
body:
This mod is a Forge port of [RainbowWrenchForJei](https://github.com/vfyjxf/RainbowWrenchForJei)[RainbowWrenchForJei](https://github.com/vfyjxf/RainbowWrenchForJei).

It modifies the JEI (Just Enough Items) cheating mode button, replacing the default symbol with a colorful, rotating rainbow wrench. This small visual change makes the interface more lively and fun, while keeping full functionality of the original cheat mode toggle.
